passives.name: Unmake
passives.effects: Enemy champions within {{tt|700 units|center to edge}} of you become cursed, causing them to receive {{as|12% increased magic damage|magic damage}} from all sources.

effects_structured.raw: Enemy champions within 700 units become cursed, causing them to receive 12% increased magic damage from all sources.

schema_notes.effects_structured: Parsed from passive/active text for simulation use.
context_notes: Execution model: Unmake is a persistent self-centered aura that curses enemy champions inside a 700-unit radius and increases magic damage they take from all sources.
Player-visible behavior: the curse is range-gated and follows proximity; entering aura applies the amplification state and leaving aura drops it.

sources.used_for: local ingestion snapshot used during structured effect authoring
